summary: US President's promise to meet deadlines sparks uncertainty, as diplomacy or escalation? The world watches with bated breath. As Austria proposes a social media ban for children, other European countries follow suit, sparking a debate on digital safety. topic: IRAN SCHOOL STRIKE: WORLD LEADERS DEMAND ANSWERS

summary: US expects to finish Iran war 'in next couple of weeks', says Rubio. Mexico's navy searches for two missing boats involved in Cuba aid convoy. A grieving Iranian mother tells the UN about the last time she saw her children alive before the school attack. Israel launches strikes on nuclear sites, with Iran warning of retaliation.
